title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSE Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSE Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BSE Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSE Global Group:
BSE Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE Global Group!
